      ProgramElement transform(ProgramElement pe, Services services, SVInstantiations svInst)
      Replaces the MethodBodyStatement shortcut with the full body, performs prefix adjustments in the body (execution context).

    • Method Detail

      • transform

        public ProgramElement transform(ProgramElement pe,
                       Services services,
                       SVInstantiations svInst)
        Replaces the MethodBodyStatement shortcut with the full body, performs prefix adjustments in the body (execution context).
        Specified by:
        transform in class ProgramTransformer
        Parameters:
        services - the Services with all necessary information about the java programs
        svInst - the instantiations esp. of the inner and outer label
        pe - the ProgramElement on which the execution is performed
        Returns:
        the transformed program
